title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: MOSAIC COMMUNITY HEALTH MADRAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 390 SE 10th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 and OHP general public in the school district Hours: Monday 9am-1pm and 2pm-6pm, Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-1pm and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 383-3005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 383-3005 Main phone Main phone (541) 383-3005 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurance, and offers sliding scale fees. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday 9am-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 8am-5pm, TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The SBHC is located in a modular unit North of the Madras High School building near the tennis courts. Access is from SE 10th St (turn into drive along tennis courts). Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOSAIC COMMUNITY HEALTH MADRAS HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
